title: evalci: Statistical Rigor for LLM Evaluation
description: Statistically sound comparisons between LLMs on benchmarks: confidence intervals (Wilson/Clopper-Pearson/bootstrap), paired significance tests (permutation/bootstrap/McNemar), power analysis, clustered standard errors for multi-sample decoding, and multiple-comparison correction across many models/benchmarks. Validated against statsmodels/exact-enumeration fixtures.
